Japanese: 同日　午後　１時　６分 地方裁判所　第７法廷
English: February 10, 1:06 PM District Court Courtroom No. 7

Japanese: ‥‥それでは、審理を つづけたいと思います。
English: ...Now then, let's continue where we left off, shall we?

Japanese: よろしいですかな？　証人。
English: Well, witness?

Japanese: 何かしら？　‥‥オジサマ。
English: Yes? How can I help you? ...Mr. Judge.

Japanese: ‥‥どうやら‥‥ 《真実》を知るためには、
English: Well... It seems that if we're to learn the truth...

Japanese: ワレワレは、あなたの証言を 聞く必要があるようです。
English: ...we'll need to hear your testimony.

Japanese: アタシは、かまわないわ。
English: I have no problem with that.

Japanese: 《真実》なんて、知らないほうが いいかもしれないけど、ね。
English: But when you've seen what I have, sometimes the truth is better left unknown.

Japanese: ‥‥それでは、 証言をおねがいします！
English: ...In any case, let's hear your testimony!

Japanese: 事件当夜、葉桜院で実行された 《計画》について！
English: Tell us about the plan that was carried out that night!
-- The Plan --

Japanese: ‥‥すべての計画は、 アタシの死によって始まったわ。
English: ...The whole plan began with my death.

Japanese: 《自分の娘を家元にする》‥‥ 綾里　キミ子の、くだらない計画。
English: A stupid plan hatched by Morgan Fey to install her own daughter as the next Master.

Japanese: そのためには‥‥、綾里　真宵を 暗殺してしまえばよかった。
English: But for it to work... Maya Fey would first have to die.

Japanese: 真宵を殺す役は、アタシ。その罪は あやめに着せるはずだったわ。
English: The idea was for me to kill Maya and then have the blame pinned on Iris.

Japanese: ちょっと、計画は狂ったけど‥‥ どうやら、成功したみたいね。
English: The plan went wrong... but it seems to have succeeded anyway.

Japanese: そ‥‥それでは、 あなたは、やはり‥‥
English: S-So that means... Y-You really are...

Japanese: ちょっと待ってください！ 今の証言‥‥
English: Wait a minute!

Japanese: 綾里　真宵を‥‥ 《暗殺》ですって‥‥？
English: Did you just say the plan was to kill Maya Fey...?

Japanese: それが、何か‥‥？
English: Yes. You have a problem with that...?

Japanese: ふざけるな！ ‥‥まさか、彼女を‥‥
English: Don't give us that nonsense! There's no way that--

Japanese: みっともねえぜ‥‥まるほどう。
English: Watch yourself, Trite!

Japanese: ギモンは、尋問で解決する。 ‥‥そいつが、オレのルールだぜ。
English: If you've got a problem, solve it during cross-examination! ...That's my rule.

Japanese: そ、そうです！　ちなみに それは、私のルールでもあります！
English: Mr. Godot is correct! And by the way... that's my rule as well!

Japanese: （ま‥‥真宵ちゃんが‥‥ まさか、そんなことが！）
English: (To kill Maya...? Could it be true!?)
-- The Plan --

Japanese: ‥‥すべての計画は、 アタシの死によって始まったわ。
English: ...The whole plan began with my death.

Japanese: 《自分の娘を家元にする》‥‥ 綾里　キミ子の、くだらない計画。
English: A stupid plan hatched by Morgan Fey to install her own daughter as the next Master.

Japanese: そのためには‥‥、綾里　真宵を 暗殺してしまえばよかった。
English: But for it to work... Maya Fey would first have to die.

Japanese: 真宵を殺す役は、アタシ。その罪は あやめに着せるはずだったわ。
English: The idea was for me to kill Maya and then have the blame pinned on Iris.

Japanese: ちょっと、計画は狂ったけど‥‥ どうやら、成功したみたいね。
English: The plan went wrong... but it seems to have succeeded anyway.

Japanese: （信じられない！ あいつが、真宵ちゃんを‥‥）
English: (I can't believe it! She meant to kill Maya...)

Japanese: （‥‥とにかく、 今は、冷静になるんだ！）
English: (I've got to keep a cool head!)

Japanese: （そして‥‥情報を引き出そう）
English: (And... I need to get more information out of her.)

Japanese: （この《計画》と‥‥ あの女を理解するために！）
English: (It's the only way to understand this plan, and what she was after as well!)

Japanese: 綾里　真宵を殺した理由‥‥ その《目的》がわかるかしら？
English: Do you understand why I would kill Maya Fey now? What my goal was?

Japanese: 先月の《死刑》‥‥ですか。
English: You were executed last month, correct?

Japanese: そう。‥‥絞首刑。 死ぬのもラクじゃないわ。
English: Yes. I was hanged. It wasn't exactly... pleasant.

Japanese: いったい、どうやって 打ち合わせをしたんですか？
English: How did you manage to discuss the plan?

Japanese: 今回の計画のことを‥‥ 綾里　キミ子と。
English: When did you talk with Morgan Fey?

Japanese: 去年‥‥あの女の刑が 決まって、刑務所に入ってきたわ。
English: Last year, she was transferred to the same detention center as me.

Japanese: アタシが死刑囚で、彼女が 母親ということもあって‥‥
English: Since I was on death row and she was my mother...

Japanese: ふたりで会うのは、 意外にラクだったわ。
English: ...it was actually pretty easy to meet with her.

Japanese: なるほど。 そのときに、計画を‥‥
English: I see... So that's when you discussed the plan?

Japanese: ‥‥ハッ！ あきれるでしょ？
English: ...Ha! Are you crazy?

Japanese: あの女の計画には、最初から アタシの死が組みこまれていた。
English: At first, that woman was planning to kill me as well!

Japanese: ‥‥自分のムスメだってのにね。
English: ...Even though I'm her own daughter.

Japanese: 綾里　春美を家元に するため、ですか‥‥
English: All to make Pearl Fey the Master of Kurain...?

Japanese: キミ子のココロは、もうとっくに コワれているわ。
English: She's a cold, twisted woman.

Japanese: ‥‥自分がつかむハズ だった、彼女の“栄光”‥‥
English: She thought she could finally regain her lost honor.

Japanese: 《家元》の座を、 妹の舞子に奪われたときに‥‥。
English: The honor she lost when her younger sister, Misty, took her place as the Master.

Japanese: その日から‥‥今回の 計画は始まっていたのね。
English: Ever since that day, she's been working on this plan.
Hmm... A plan, huh...

Japanese: ‥‥自分の娘、というのは‥‥ 綾里　春美、ですね。
English: You're talking about Pearl Fey, is that correct?

Japanese: キミ子も、最初はアタシたちに 目をつけていたみたいだけど。
English: Yes, though at first she had high hopes for the two of us.

Japanese: アンタと‥‥双子の妹の あやめ、ってワケかい。
English: You and your twin sister, Iris?

Japanese: 幸い、アタシたちは、くだらない 《霊力》には縁がなかったわ。
English: That's correct. Fortunately, neither of us had much spiritual power.

Japanese: だから‥‥捨てられた。 父親といっしょにね。
English: That's why... we were abandoned by her... along with our father.

Japanese: す‥‥、捨てられた‥‥
English: A-Abandoned...?

Japanese: アタシは、自分の暮らし以外は どうでもよかったから‥‥
English: The only person I ever really cared about in life was myself...

Japanese: トロい妹を、あのビンボーくさい 古寺に追い払ってやったわけ。
English: My sister was a nuisance, so I convinced my father to leave her at an old temple.

Japanese: あやめさん、ですか‥‥？
English: You mean Iris...?

Japanese: ‥‥父親の再婚相手にも、 ムスメがひとり、いたわ。
English: ...Yes, my father remarried a woman who also had a daughter.

Japanese: 子どもの数は、少ないに 越したことはないでしょ？
English: The less children you have, the more money there is to go around, right?

Japanese: それに、父親は、子どもには まったく無関心だったし。
English: And on top of that, my father had absolutely no interest in children in general.

Japanese: ‥‥なんと、ヒドいことを‥‥
English: H... How horrible...

Japanese: 本当にヒドいのは、アイツよ。 あきらめの悪い、あのオンナ‥‥
English: The real horrible one was that woman... That bitter, vengeful woman.

Japanese: アイツの執念で、あの子が 産まれた。‥‥春美という子が。
English: It was her stubbornness that gave birth to that child... Pearl Fey.

Japanese: 《霊力》もじゅうぶんだったわ。 あの子にとっては、不幸なコトに。
English: She was born with an abundance of spiritual power. ...Unfortunately for her.

Japanese: キミ子は、春美に自分の夢を たくしたの。
English: Morgan Fey heaped all of her broken hopes and dreams on to that poor child's back.

Japanese: 倉院流の《家元》になるという、 くだらない、ちっぽけな夢を‥‥
English: All because of her pathetic dreams of having her bloodline become the main family.

Japanese: ま、真宵ちゃんを‥‥ “暗殺”だとッ！
English: Maya would have to die!? But why!?

Japanese: 家元の血を絶ってしまえば、 分家にチャンスが回ってくるわ。
English: For our bloodline to succeed as the main family, thus making Pearl the new Master...

Japanese: 春美が《家元》になるためには、 それしか方法はないでしょ。
English: ...the remaining descendants of the current Master had to be taken care of.

Japanese: そんな計画、春美ちゃんが 認めるワケがない！
English: But Pearls would never agree to a plan like that!

Japanese: 春美ちゃんは、 真宵ちゃんのことを‥‥
English: She adores Maya...

Japanese: ‥‥やれやれ。 まだ、わからないのかしら‥‥？
English: ...How sad. You still don't get it, do you?

Japanese: 春美の意志なんて、 まったくカンケイないの。
English: What Pearl wanted had nothing to do with it.

Japanese: キミ子にとってダイジなのは、 春美なんかじゃない。
English: Morgan didn't care one bit about Pearl.

Japanese: 《家元》の座。 ‥‥それだけなのよ。
English: The only thing she cared about was the position of the Master. That's all.

Japanese: そ‥‥そんな、バカな話が‥‥！
English: Th-That's ridiculous...!

Japanese: ‥‥そのためには、すべてを ギセイにしても、かまわない。
English: She was willing to sacrifice anything and anyone to achieve her goal.

Japanese: 自分の娘も‥‥モチロン、 綾里　真宵の命も、ね。
English: The life of her daughter... and naturally, the life of Maya Fey as well.

Japanese: （‥‥なんてこった‥‥）
English: (How could anyone do that...?)

Japanese: お、おまえが‥‥ おまえが、真宵ちゃんを‥‥？
English: Y-You...? You were going to kill Maya?

Japanese: ‥‥春美は、 何も知らなくてよかった‥‥
English: Pearl didn't need to know anything about it...

Japanese: あの子は、手紙のとおりに アタシを呼ぶだけでよかった。
English: All she had to do was to follow the instructions in the letter and channel me.

Japanese: あとは‥‥あの子にかわって、 アタシが、ケリをつけるだけ。
English: Then I would have simply used her body and finished the job.

Japanese: なにしろ‥‥
English: In any case...

Japanese: 死者が何をしようと、アンタたち には、手がとどかないのだから‥‥
English: I'm already dead, and there's nothing any of you can do to me...
Grrrr...!

Japanese: その“罪”を‥‥ 妹に着せようとしたワケか。
English: So the plan was to blame the crime on your younger sister.

Japanese: 葉桜院の《あやめ》に‥‥
English: On Sister Iris of Hazakura Temple...

Japanese: アタシとあの子は、見分けが つかないほど似ていたわ。
English: She and I look absolutely identical. No one can tell us apart.

Japanese: アタシが真宵を殺すところを だれかに目撃させれば‥‥
English: If someone were to witness me killing Maya...

Japanese: 《殺人の罪を着せられる》 ‥‥そう考えたわけ。
English: ...naturally they would think it was Iris that had done it.

Japanese: その《目撃者》ってのが‥‥ あの住職だったのか！
English: And the witness in this case was the head nun, Sister Bikini.

Japanese: まさか、葉桜院に 帰っちゃうとは思わなかったわ。
English: I never would've guessed she was going to return to Hazakura Temple that night.

Japanese: でも‥‥‥結果的には、あやめの 《犯行》を目撃してくれたけど。
English: But... she wound up seeing Iris's "crime" anyway.

Japanese: しかし！　なぜ、あやめさんに 罪を着せようとしたのですか！
English: But why did you want to pin the murder on Iris in the first place!?

Japanese: あなたの妹さん‥‥なのですよね？
English: She's your twin sister, isn't she?

Japanese: “いもうと”‥‥？ とんでもないわ。
English: Twin sister...!? Don't make me laugh!

Japanese: アイツは、ただの裏切り者よ。 何をされても、モンクは言えない。
English: She's nothing but a backstabber. I couldn't care less about her.

Japanese: “うらぎりもの”‥‥？
English: Backstabber...?

Japanese: アンタには、わからないわ。 ‥‥永久に、ね。
English: You just don't understand. ...You never will.

Japanese: とにかく‥‥
English: Anyway...

Japanese: せ、“成功”‥‥だって？
English: You think the plan was a success?

Japanese: そうよ。 あのオンナの計画どおり‥‥
English: You heard me. Just as that woman had hoped...

Japanese: ‥‥綾里　真宵は死んだわ。
English: ...Maya Fey is dead.

Japanese: これで、《家元》の座は 春美のものになるわね。
English: Now the title of the Master will pass on to Pearl Fey.

Japanese: ば、バカな！ ま、真宵ちゃんは‥‥
English: Th-That's absurd! M-Maya is just...

Japanese: 閉じこめられているんだ！ あの、修験洞の中に！
English: She's just trapped! Trapped inside the Sacred Cavern!

Japanese: フッ‥‥
English: Really...?

Japanese: あいかわらず、マヌケなのね。 ‥‥リュウちゃん‥‥
English: You're as foolishly optimistic as ever, aren't you... my darling Feenie?

Japanese: 今だから、教えてあげる。
English: Do you want to know the truth?

Japanese: 大っキライだったわ。 ‥‥初めて会ったときから。
English: Ever since we met... I've despised you.

Japanese: アマったれで‥‥ ヒトを信じることしかできない。
English: Your sniveling naïveté and your pathetic faith in other people.

Japanese: おまえは‥‥綾里　キミ子に 協力したワケじゃなかったのか？
English: Obviously... It's because you were helping Morgan Fey.

Japanese: ‥‥“協力”‥‥？ 笑わせるわね。
English: Helping...? Don't make me laugh.

Japanese: 生まれてから死ぬまで‥‥アタシは ヒトに手を貸したことはないわ。
English: From the day I was born to the day I died, I never helped anyone!

Japanese: アタシは、アタシのために生きて、 そして‥‥死ぬ。当然でしょ？
English: I lived for myself and, in the end, I died for myself. I thought that was obvious.

Japanese: （‥‥この女は、キミ子に 協力したわけじゃなかった‥‥）
English: (So she wasn't actually cooperating with Morgan...)

Japanese: （あくまでも、自分の目的のため キミ子の計画を《利用》した！）
English: (She was just using Morgan and her plan so she could accomplish her own goal!)

Japanese: アタシは、どうしても 綾里　真宵を殺してやりたかった。
English: All I wanted to do was kill Maya Fey.

Japanese: それ以外に‥‥アタシが“復讐” できる方法はなかったから‥‥
English: That was the only way I could think of to get revenge...
(Revenge...?)

Japanese: （どうやら‥‥そいつを つきつけるしかない‥‥）
English: (It looks like I have no choice but to present that piece of evidence...)

Japanese: ‥‥１つだけ‥‥ 教えてほしい。
English: I just want to know one thing...

Japanese: きみ自身は、綾里　キミ子の計画を どう思っていたんだ‥‥？
English: What did you personally think of Morgan Fey's plan?

Japanese: 言ったはずよ。 “くだらない”って。
English: I told you already, didn't I? It was a stupid plan.

Japanese: なんのイミも、価値もない。 自分のためにすら、ならない‥‥
English: It had no point, no value other than fulfilling her own greedy desires...

Japanese: ‥‥そう。 この世で、最低の計画ね。
English: ...Yes. It was certainly nothing to be proud of.

Japanese: それならば、なぜ！ 綾里　キミ子に手を貸したんだ！
English: If that's how you feel, why did you help her carry it out!?

Japanese: 真宵ちゃんを‥‥ 殺そう、なんて‥‥！
English: Why would you do it...? Why would you kill Maya!?

Japanese: お人好しのアンタには わからないかもしれないわね。
English: You may not understand it, being the kind and gentle soul that you are...

Japanese: なぜ、このアタシが‥‥ あのオンナに手を貸したか？
English: You may not be able to appreciate why someone like me would help a woman like that.

Japanese: どうしてなんだッ！
English: So then tell me! Why!?

Japanese: 決まってるでしょ？ アタシは、あのオンナとはちがう。
English: Isn't it obvious? I'm not like that woman.

Japanese: アタシは、アタシのためにしか 行動しないわ。
English: I only act in my own self-interest.

Japanese: あのオンナに協力したのは‥‥ 自分のため。
English: The reason I helped her was... for myself.

Japanese: この、アタシの《目的》を 果たすためよ！
English: For my own personal satisfaction!

Japanese: なんだと‥‥！
English: What did you say...!?

Japanese: （このオンナ‥‥ 美柳　ちなみには‥‥）
English: (So this woman, Dahlia Hawthorne...)

Japanese: （彼女だけの 《目的》があったのか‥‥！）
English: (She had her own reason for wanting Maya dead...!?)

Japanese: もしかしたら‥‥
English: Could it be...

Japanese: あなたの《目的》は、綾里　真宵 自身ではなかったのでは‥‥？
English: ...that your actual goal had nothing to do with Maya Fey herself...?

Japanese: ‥‥アンタたちは、アタシを 罰することはできない。
English: ...As I said, none of you have the power to punish me anymore.

Japanese: なぜなら‥‥ アタシは、《死者》だから。
English: Because I'm already dead.

Japanese: それと同じコトよ。
English: Well, I had the same problem, you see.

Japanese: 死者は、罰することも‥‥ 復讐することもできないの。
English: You can't punish the dead... and you can't take revenge against them either.

Japanese: ふ、“ふくしゅう”‥‥
English: Y-You wanted to take revenge on someone?

Japanese: アタシが死刑になったのは‥‥ あのオンナのせいよ。
English: I was sentenced to die because of that woman...

Japanese: ‥‥綾里　千尋‥‥。
English: Mia Fey.

Japanese: （やっぱり‥‥そうか）
English: (I somehow knew this was it...)

Japanese: ‥‥思い知らせてやりたかった。
English: ...I wanted to send her a message.

Japanese: アタシに、初めてクツジョクを 与えた、あの綾里　千尋に‥‥
English: It was at her hands that I suffered my first humiliation...

Japanese: 同じ思いをさせたかったのよ！
English: I wanted her to feel the same pain she made me feel!

Japanese: でも‥‥それは、不可能だと あきらめていたわ。
English: Sadly... when I realized revenge was impossible, I gave up.

Japanese: その理由は、モチロン‥‥
English: And the reason it was impossible...?

Japanese: 綾里　千尋も‥‥すでに 死んでいるから、だな‥‥？
English: Was it perhaps because Mia Fey had already died...?

Japanese: ‥‥たった１つだけ‥‥ 死者に復讐する方法に気づいたの。
English: Yes. And I realized... there's only one way to take revenge against the dead.

Japanese: な‥‥ なんですかな、それは！
English: A-And how do you do that?

Japanese: 肉体は消えても、その魂は‥‥ プライドは、永遠に残るわ。
English: Even when the body dies, the spirit, the ego, it lives on... forever.

Japanese: 綾里　千尋にとって、いちばん 大切な者の命を、奪う。
English: I wanted to take away the person that Mia Fey loved most.

Japanese: アタシが、この手で‥‥殺す！ それこそが‥‥
English: I wanted to kill her with my own hands!

Japanese: 綾里　千尋に対する、 アタシの復讐だったのよ！
English: That would be the one and only way I could take my revenge against Mia Fey!

Japanese: それこそが、あのオンナの計画に 手を貸した、たった１つの理由よ！
English: That was the reason I helped out with that woman's plans!

Japanese: そんなことのために、 真宵ちゃんを‥‥！
English: Just for that!? For that you would kill Maya!?

Japanese: おまえのやったことは‥‥ 綾里　キミ子と同じだ！
English: Your goal was no different than that of Morgan Fey!

Japanese: 母親も母親なら‥‥ 娘もムスメ、ですね‥‥
English: As they say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree."

Japanese: ひたすら自己中心的で、 ‥‥ザンコクな計画です。
English: What a cruel plan... Cruel, cold, and heartless.

Japanese: ‥‥ハッ！ 死者に何を言っても、ムダよ。
English: ...Hmph! Don't waste your time preaching to the dead.

Japanese: どうあがこうと、アンタたちは アタシに手が届かないんだから。
English: I've already told you, there's not a thing you can do to me.
Grrrr...!

Japanese: ‥‥あの夜‥‥
English: That night...

Japanese: 午後９時半ごろ、アタシは “この世”に降りてきた。
English: ...at about 9:30 PM, I materialized into this world.

Japanese: 急いで髪を結いなおして‥‥ 《退魔のずきん》を用意したわ。
English: I quickly pinned my hair up and put on a demon-warding hood.

Japanese: そして‥‥そばにあったツエを 持って、葉桜院を出たの。
English: Then I picked up the staff that was by my side and left Hazakura Temple.

Japanese: （やはり‥‥彼女を霊媒したのは 天流斎　エリスだったのか‥‥）
English: (So... it was Elise Deauxnim who channeled her after all.)

Japanese: ‥‥あの住職、アタシには 気がつかなかったわ。
English: ...That ridiculous head nun never noticed a thing.

Japanese: 《はなれ》でしたくをしている 綾里　真宵を残して‥‥
English: She left Maya Fey at the Inner Temple...

Japanese: コシを抱えて、よろめきながら 帰ってしまった‥‥
English: ...and wobbled back clutching her poor old back.

Japanese: そ。そこで、あなたは‥‥？
English: Wh-What did you do then...?

Japanese: あんな、ガキ‥‥ カンタンなシゴトだったわ。
English: That kid was easier to handle than I had hoped...

Japanese: 大きな灯ろうの前で‥‥ アタシは、あの子を追いつめた。
English: I caught up with her in front of the stone lantern.

Japanese: そして‥‥物置で拾った 小刀で、切りかかったの。
English: Then I took out the dagger I got from the storeroom and...

Japanese: そ、それで！　お、おまえは‥‥
English: S-So then you...

Japanese: ま‥‥真宵ちゃんを‥‥ 刺した、って言うのかッ！
English: Y-You're saying you s-stabbed Maya!

Japanese: ‥‥フシギなことに‥‥
English: It's strange, but...

Japanese: そこからの記憶は ハッキリしないの。
English: I don't have a clear memory of what happened after that.

Japanese: ‥‥どういうことですか！ “ハッキリしない”‥‥？
English: ...What does that mean!? No clear memory...?

Japanese: わからない‥‥
English: I don't know...

Japanese: アタシ‥‥ 刺されたような気がするわ。
English: I think... I think I was stabbed.

Japanese: さ、刺された‥‥だって！
English: You were stabbed!?

Japanese: 最後の瞬間‥‥綾里　真宵は アタシに反撃したのね、きっと。
English: At the last minute, Maya Fey must have stabbed me. I'm sure of it.

Japanese: ば‥‥バカなッ！ 真宵ちゃんが‥‥反撃なんて！
English: That's not like her at all! Maya wouldn't stab a French fry with a plastic fork!

Japanese: とにかく‥‥急に‥‥ 意識が、遠くなって‥‥
English: Anyway, I suddenly lost consciousness...

Japanese: アタシ、灯ろうにもたれかかって ‥‥あの、名前を書いたわ。
English: But before I did... I scrawled her name on the lantern.

Japanese: 背中ごしに《マヨイ》って‥‥。 ‥‥夢中だった。
English: Just as I was passing out, I wrote "Maya" behind my back.

Japanese: せめて‥‥綾里　真宵に 疑いがかかるように‥‥
English: I had hoped it would cast suspicion on her.

Japanese: （な、なんという くらい執念だ‥‥）
English: (I-I can't believe she was thinking of that until the bitter end...)

Japanese: ‥‥そこで‥‥ アタシの記憶は、とぎれたの。
English: ...That's where my memory temporarily stops.

Japanese: と‥‥“とぎれた”‥‥？
English: It-It stops...?

Japanese: 《綾里　真宵をこの手で殺害した》 ‥‥アタシに、その記憶はないわ。
English: I don't have any memory of actually killing Maya Fey with my own two hands.

Japanese: あのときの、最後の記憶は‥‥
English: My very last memory was...

Japanese: 綾里　真宵の、おびえきった目。
English: ...Maya's terror-filled eyes.

Japanese: ‥‥そして‥‥ 次に意識を取り戻したとき‥‥
English: When I woke up after that...

Japanese: アタシは、闇の中‥‥ 《修験洞》にいたわ。
English: ...I was in the Sacred Cavern surrounded by darkness.

Japanese: しゅ‥‥修験洞？ ほら穴の中、ですか‥‥
English: You were in the Sacred Cavern?

Japanese: ‥‥入り口には、いまいましい 《錠》がかかっていた。
English: ...The entrance was sealed with one of those trick locks.

Japanese: アタシ、閉じこめられて しまったわけね。
English: Somehow I had been trapped in there.

Japanese: なぜ‥‥アンタが、 そんなところに？
English: But how did you wind up in there?

Japanese: ‥‥こっちが聞きたいわね。
English: ...I'd like to know that myself.

Japanese: とにかく‥‥アセったわ。
English: Anyway, I was worried...

Japanese: アタシは、まだ綾里　真宵の 死体を、この目で見ていなかった。
English: I didn't know whether or not Maya Fey was dead...

Japanese: この手で、殺すまで‥‥ 冥界に帰るワケには行かない。
English: And I swore I wouldn't return to the underworld until I knew I had killed her myself.

Japanese: く‥‥‥クッ！ しつこいオンナだぜ‥‥
English: Hmm... For a ghost, you're one tough cookie...

Japanese: すぐにでも、あの子の死体を カクニンしに行きたかった。
English: I wanted to get out of there and make sure she was dead.

Japanese: ‥‥でも‥‥できなかったわ。
English: But... I couldn't do it. I couldn't get out.

Japanese: 《からくり錠》‥‥か‥‥
English: The trick lock stopped you, huh?

Japanese: アタシ、はずし方を 知らなかったから。
English: I didn't know how to remove it.

Japanese: そ、それでは‥‥あなたは！
English: So then you're saying...

Japanese: 閉じこめられていたわけですか！ 修験洞の中に‥‥！
English: ...you were actually confined against your will inside this Sacred Cavern...?

Japanese: 一刻も早く、いまいましい《錠》を 解除したかったんだけど‥‥
English: Yes! I wanted to get rid of that annoying lock as soon as possible...

Japanese: そうカンタンには行かなかった。 途中で何度か、ジャマが入ったし。
English: But it wasn't easy. I kept getting interrupted while I was working on it.
Interrupted...?

Japanese: あれは、まだ朝も早いころ‥‥ 修験堂に、だれかが入ってきたの。
English: It was early in the morning, but someone came into the Training Hall.

Japanese: な‥‥なんですと！ いったい、だれが！
English: What!? Who!?

Japanese: もしかして‥‥ 真宵ちゃんがッ！
English: Could it have been... Maya!?

Japanese: アタシも、そう思ったわ。 でも‥‥見ることはできなかった。
English: I thought the same thing. But I couldn't see.

Japanese: な‥‥なぜ！
English: Why not!?

Japanese: もし、第三者に私の姿を見られたら そこで復讐のチャンスは、終わり。
English: If someone had spotted me, I would have lost my chance to take revenge.

Japanese: ‥‥だから、修験洞の奥に かくれるしかなかったのよ。
English: ...So I made sure to hide myself well at the back of the Sacred Cavern.

Japanese: （‥‥あの日、修験堂に入ることが できたのは‥‥２人だけ）
English: (That morning... only two people could have gone into the Training Hall.)

Japanese: （真宵ちゃんと‥‥ 春美ちゃん、だ）
English: (Maya and... Pearls...)

Japanese: （春美ちゃんは‥‥あの掛け軸に カレーをかけるために‥‥）
English: (Pearls went there to cover the hanging scroll in gravy.)

Japanese: ‥‥それでも、やっと《錠》を はずすことができたわ。
English: Still, I finally managed to remove the lock.

Japanese: ‥‥ただ‥‥ もう、すでに遅かったみたい。
English: But... I was too late.

Japanese: “遅かった”‥‥？
English: What do you mean by that?

Japanese: ‥‥うるさいハエどもが むらがってきたのよ。
English: ...The flies had already started to gather.

Japanese: ‥‥橋が修復されて、警官たちが 捜査を始めたワケ、だな‥‥
English: The bridge had been fixed and the police had started their investigation, correct?

Japanese: アタシは当然、 出ていくことはできなかった。
English: Naturally, I couldn't go out.

Japanese: だから‥‥修験洞に戻って、 自分で《錠》をかけなおしたの。
English: So instead... I returned to the cavern and put the lock back on myself.

Japanese: もう、自分の目で真相をたしかめる チャンスはない‥‥そう思ったわ。
English: I realized I wouldn't get a chance to see Maya's corpse as I had hoped...

Japanese: でも、そのとき‥‥ 奇跡が起こった。
English: But just then... Lady Luck showed up.
Lady Luck...?

Japanese: あの、大きな地震のあと‥‥ あの子が来たわ。たったひとりで。
English: After that big earthquake... she showed up, all by herself.

Japanese: ‥‥“ホンモノ”の あやめさん、か‥‥
English: ...The real Iris?

Japanese: 修験洞がブジかどうか、 見に来たんだって。‥‥バカな子。
English: She said she'd come to make sure the Sacred Cavern was alright... Stupid girl.

Japanese: アタシは、修験洞を出て‥‥ 大まかな話を聞いたわ。
English: I came out from the Sacred Cavern and got a feel for the situation.

Japanese: ‥‥そして、かわりに あの子を閉じこめておいたの。
English: ...And I locked her away in my place.

Japanese: そのとき‥‥やっと。 すべてがわかったのよ。
English: I had finally learned exactly what had happened...

Japanese: アタシたちの計画は‥‥ 成功していたのだ、と。
English: It was then that I learned that the plan had actually succeeded.

Japanese: ‥‥どういうことだ？ 計画が‥‥“成功”‥‥？
English: What do you mean your plan had succeeded?

Japanese: アタシは‥‥１つだけ、 大きなカンちがいをしていたの。
English: I had misunderstood one thing, you see.

Japanese: あの晩、アタシの霊を 呼び出したのは‥‥
English: That night, the one that had summoned me...

Japanese: 当然、《綾里　春美》だと 思っていたわ。
English: I had assumed that it was Pearl Fey.

Japanese: そ、それはそうでしょう。 手紙で指示されているのですから。
English: W-Well of course you would've assumed that. It was written in the instructions.

Japanese: でも‥‥ちがった。
English: But... I was wrong.

Japanese: 事件当夜、アタシを 霊媒していたのは‥‥
English: The person that had actually called my spirit back was...

Japanese: 《綾里　舞子》‥‥あの 絵本作家だったのよ。
English: Misty Fey... The picture book author...

Japanese: な‥‥なんですって‥‥！
English: Wh... Whaaaaaaat!?

Japanese: だって‥‥そうとしか 考えられないでしょう？
English: Well, that's really the only possibility, isn't it?

Japanese: あの中庭で、アタシの 意識がとぎれて‥‥
English: After I lost consciousness in the garden...

Japanese: そのあとに残ったのは、 彼女の死体だったのだから‥‥
English: ...it was her body that was left lying there...

Japanese: 綾里　真宵‥‥。このアタシが 手をくだすまでもなかったわ。
English: Maya Fey... I wasn't able to kill her with my own hands after all.

Japanese: あの子は‥‥この世で最も 大きな《罪》を犯してしまった。
English: But even so... I made her commit the most vile sin a human can commit.

Japanese: この世で‥‥最も大きな‥‥？
English: And that is...?

Japanese: ‥‥そう。自分の母親を 殺害するという《罪》を！
English: Matricide. The sin of killing her own mother!

Japanese: そ‥‥‥‥ そんなあああァァァッ！
English: Ugggh... NOOOO WAY!!

Japanese: せ‥‥静粛に！　静粛に！ な、なんということでしょう‥‥
English: Or-Order! Order in the court! What is the meaning of this!?

Japanese: たしかに、綾里　真宵を 襲ったのは、このアタシ‥‥
English: It's true that I was the one who attacked Maya Fey...

Japanese: 《美柳　ちなみ》の意識だったわ。 ‥‥でも‥‥
English: But even so...

Japanese: その凶器を奪い、綾里　舞子の 息の根を止めた《殺人者》は‥‥
English: ...the murderer who actually snuffed out Misty Fey's life was none other than...

Japanese: ‥‥綾里　真宵だったのよ！
English: ...your darling little Maya!

Japanese: う‥‥ウソだッ！ そ、そんなバカな話‥‥
English: R-Ridiculous! That's nonsense...

Japanese: バカな話かどうか‥‥ 考えれば、わかるじゃない。
English: Are you sure about that? ...Just think about it.

Japanese: ‥‥アンタの大好きな 《証拠》があるでしょう？
English: There's even evidence supporting these facts, isn't there?

Japanese: な‥‥ なんだと‥‥！
English: What...!? What do you mean?

Japanese: い、いったい‥‥ どんな証拠があると言うんだ！
English: Wh-What is this so-called evidence!?

Japanese: ‥‥綾里　真宵が、消えたこと‥‥
English: ...The fact that Maya Fey has disappeared is evidence enough, isn't it?
Huh...?

Japanese: 今さら、《修験洞にいる》なんて バカなこと、言わないでね。
English: The idea that she's still in the Sacred Cavern is just ridiculous.

Japanese: 《奥の院》側から逃げることは できなかった。それなら‥‥
English: She wasn't able to escape from the Inner Temple, that much is obvious.

Japanese: 彼女のいる場所は、ただ１つしか あり得ないわ。
English: In that case, there is only one place she could be.

Japanese: そ、それは‥‥？
English: Wh-Where...?

Japanese: 決まってるでしょ。 ‥‥吾童川の底、よ。
English: Do I have to spell it out? ...The bottom of the Eagle River, where else?

Japanese: ご‥‥吾童川‥‥！
English: Ea-Eagle River...!?

Japanese: 綾里　真宵は、自分の母親を 殺してしまったのよ。
English: Maya Fey killed her long-lost mother.

Japanese: お人好しのあの子には、 とても耐えられなかった。
English: Can you imagine the guilt she must have felt when she realized that?

Japanese: ‥‥だから‥‥ あの川に、身を投げたのよ。
English: That's why she threw herself into the Eagle River.

Japanese: ‥‥死体の上がることのない あの急流に‥‥
English: Most bodies that wind up in there are lost forever.

Japanese: ‥‥いかがかしら。 リュウちゃん‥‥？
English: So, what do you have to say now... Feenie?

Japanese: う‥‥‥ううううう‥‥‥‥
English: Ooooh... Uuuuuhhhh...

Japanese: ‥‥‥おっと。 電話が、オレを呼んでるぜ。
English: ...Oops. Sorry, that's my phone.

Japanese: （なんの曲なんだよ、あれ‥‥）
English: (What kind of ringtone is that...?)

Japanese: ‥‥ゴドーだ。
English: ...Godot here.

Japanese: ‥‥わかった。ごくろうだったな。
English: ...OK. Thanks.

Japanese: な‥‥なんですか‥‥？
English: W-Was it something important?

Japanese: たった今、修験洞の《錠》が すべて解除された。
English: They just finished removing the locks from the Sacred Cavern.

Japanese: なんですって！
English: That's great!

Japanese: それで‥‥真宵ちゃんは！
English: What about Maya?

Japanese: 修験洞の中から、 ひとりの女が保護された。
English: There was a woman in the cave...

Japanese: 綾里　真宵さん‥‥ですか！
English: Was it Maya Fey...?

Japanese: 葉桜院　あやめ。‥‥被告人だ。
English: It was the accused... Sister Iris.
Huh...?

Japanese: 当然でしょ。
English: Don't look so surprised.

Japanese: ‥‥アタシがきのう、 閉じこめておいたんだから。
English: ...I locked her in there yesterday. I just got finished telling you that.

Japanese: じゃ、じゃあ‥‥ 真宵ちゃんは‥‥？
English: So... what about Maya? Where is she?

Japanese: 修験洞の中には、 他にだれもいなかった。
English: There was no one else found inside the Sacred Cavern.

Japanese: そ‥‥‥そんな‥‥‥
English: N-No... It can't be...

Japanese: ‥‥だから、言ったじゃない。 あの子はもう、死んだ‥‥って。
English: I told you, didn't I? She's dead.
No...

Japanese: うおおおおおおおおおおおおおおお おおおおおおおおおおおおおおッ！
English: Noooooooooooooooooooooooo ooooooooooooooooooooooooo!

Japanese: ‥‥どうやら‥‥
English: It seems...

Japanese: 結論が出たようですな。 とても、悲しい結論が‥‥
English: ...that this case has come to an end... A tragic end...

Japanese: 天流斎　エリス‥‥いや、 綾里　舞子さんを殺害したのは‥‥
English: Sadly, it appears the killer of Elise Deauxnim, also known as Misty Fey...

Japanese: 実の娘である、綾里　真宵だった。
English: ...was her own daughter, Maya Fey.

Japanese: そして、彼女は‥‥ 罪の重さに耐えかねて、
English: Overcome with guilt for what she had done...

Japanese: 吾童川の急流に身を投げた！
English: ...Maya Fey jumped to her death into the raging waters of the Eagle River!

Japanese: （‥‥なんてこった‥‥）
English: (It can't be...)

Japanese: まるほどう‥‥ こんなコトバを知ってるかい？
English: Trite... Have you ever heard this one?

Japanese: 《あり得ないことを、すべて 消去していけば‥‥》
English: "Once you eliminate the impossible..."

Japanese: 《最後に残るのは‥‥ たった１つの“真実”》
English: "...whatever remains must be the truth."

Japanese: ‥‥たとえそれが、どんなに 信じがたいものであっても、な。
English: ...No matter how improbable it may seem.

Japanese: ど‥‥どういうことですか？ ゴドー検事‥‥
English: Wh... What is that supposed to mean, Prosecutor Godot...?

Japanese: ‥‥この女は言った。
English: According to this witness...

Japanese: 『綾里　真宵は、 吾童川に身を投げた』‥‥と。
English: ...Maya Fey threw herself into the Eagle River.

Japanese: しかし。‥‥本当にそれは 《真実》なのか‥‥？
English: However... is that really the truth?

Japanese: ‥‥思い出すんだ。 この女の証言を。
English: Remember, this woman testified earlier that...

Japanese: 『中庭で事件が起こったとき ‥‥橋はすでに、燃えていた』
English: ...the bridge was already on fire when the murder was taking place in the garden.

Japanese: つまり‥‥綾里　真宵が 川に身を投げようとしたら‥‥
English: Which means if Maya had thrown herself into the river...

Japanese: 奥の院側のガケっぷち‥‥橋の たもとから、ということになる。
English: ...it must have been from the Inner Temple side, near the bridge.

Japanese: そうよ！　綾里　真宵は、 そこから‥‥
English: That's right! That's where she jumped from...

Japanese: ‥‥あり得ねえのさ。
English: But that's impossible.

Japanese: そこから、川に身を投げるのは‥‥ 不可能だった！
English: It's impossible to jump into the river from there!
(Wh-What...!?)

Japanese: いいか。ココロを揺らされるな、 まるほどう‥‥
English: Don't get your panties all twisted up, Trite.

Japanese: 落ちついて、もう一度‥‥ よく考えてみろ。
English: Just relax and think through the whole thing again.

Japanese: （真宵ちゃんが‥‥）
English: (So it's impossible...?)

Japanese: （吾童川に身を投げるのは 《不可能》だった‥‥？）
English: (Maya couldn't have thrown herself into Eagle River...?)

Japanese: ‥‥いかがですか、成歩堂くん。
English: ...Well, Mr. Wright?

Japanese: 《綾里　真宵は、奥の院側の 橋のたもとから川に身を投げた》
English: Ms. Hawthorne claims Ms. Fey threw herself into the river from the Inner Temple side.

Japanese: 美柳　ちなみの主張をくつがえす 証拠を、提示できますか！
English: Do you have any evidence that refutes this claim?

Japanese: ‥‥それが、 あなたのコタエ‥‥ですか。
English: ...That's it? That's your answer?

Japanese: クッ‥‥！
川に身を投げるべきなのは‥‥ どうやら、アンタだったらしいぜ。
English: The only one that should be thrown into a river is you.
Ugh...!

Japanese: ‥‥もっとも。 アンタが身を投げたとしても‥‥
English: But then again... Even if you did...

Japanese: 川には届かないだろうが、な。
English: ...you wouldn't reach the river, would you?

Japanese: （ど‥‥どういうことだ‥‥？ 川には‥‥“届かない”‥‥）
English: (Huh...? What's that...? I wouldn't reach it...?)

Japanese: ‥‥《奥の院》側から、吾童川に 身を投げることはできない‥‥
English: It's impossible to jump into the Eagle River from the Inner Temple side...

Japanese: それは、証人がイチバン よく知っているはずです！
English: No one knows that better than this witness!

Japanese: ‥‥なんですって‥‥？
English: What did you say...?

Japanese: ‥‥１０年ほど前。きみも、身を 投げたじゃないか‥‥吾童川に。
English: Eleven years ago, you jumped into the very same river!

Japanese: 現場付近の 上面図を見てください！
English: Just take a look at this overhead map!

Japanese: ごらんのとおり‥‥
English: As you can see...

Japanese: 《奥の院》側のガケの下には、 岩場が広がっています！
English: ...below the cliff on the Inner Temple side is a big rock shelf!

Japanese: お‥‥‥おおおおおッ！ た、たしかに‥‥
English: Oh... Ooooh! Y-You're right!

Japanese: もし、身を投げたとしても‥‥ その身体は、川には届かない。
English: She wouldn't have reached the river if she had jumped off from there.

Japanese: つまり‥‥‥
English: In other words...

Japanese: この写真の岩場に、彼女の死体が 写っていなければならないのです！
English: If she had jumped, we should be able to see her body in this photo!
Ah!

Japanese: クッ‥‥！ やっと気がついたかい、アンタ！
English: Ha...! So you finally figured it out!

Japanese: う‥‥‥ きゃあああああああああああっ！
English: You...! Nooooooooo!

Japanese: せ‥‥静粛に！　静粛に！
English: O-Order! Order!!

Japanese: む‥‥ムダな悪あがきは み、見苦しいわ！
English: You... You're just playing with me!

Japanese: 綾里　真宵は、 吾童川の底に沈んでいるのよ！
English: Maya Fey's body is at the bottom of the Eagle River!

Japanese: それ以外に‥‥あのガキが 身をかくす場所なんか、ないッ！
English: There's nowhere else she could possibly be hiding!

Japanese: ちなみさん。‥‥こういうコトバを 知っていますか？
English: Ms. Hawthorne... Have you ever heard this one before?

Japanese: 《あり得ないことを、すべて 消去していけば‥‥》
English: "Once you eliminate the impossible..."

Japanese: 《最後に残るのは‥‥ たった１つの“真実”》
English: "...whatever remains must be the truth."

Japanese: ‥‥さっき、聞いたわ。
English: Yes, just a few minutes ago.

Japanese: ‥‥綾里　真宵は、 修験洞の中にはいなかった。
English: ...Maya Fey wasn't inside the Sacred Cavern.

Japanese: そして‥‥吾童川に 身を投げたのでも、ない。
English: We now know that she didn't throw herself into the Eagle River.

Japanese: ‥‥そう。
English: ...Correct.

Japanese: 今度こそ‥‥ すべての可能性が消去された。
English: That eliminates all the most likely possibilities.

Japanese: そして、残ったのは‥‥ たった１カ所だけです。
English: Now, although it seems improbable, there's still one other place she could be.

Japanese: な‥‥なんですと‥‥！
English: Wh... What...!?

Japanese: まだ、あるのですかッ！ 《可能性》が‥‥
English: What is this one possibility you are talking about...?

Japanese: は‥‥ハッタリに決まってる！
English: Th-That's obviously a bluff!

Japanese: いったい‥‥‥彼女の死体が どこにかくされているというの！
English: So where is her dead body then?

Japanese: （どうやら‥‥やっと わかったような気がする‥‥）
English: (Finally... I think the pieces are falling into place...)

Japanese: （“生者”の力では、決して 手の届かない、“死者”‥‥）
English: (Normally the living have no way to punish the dead...)

Japanese: （その美柳　ちなみに、究極の 《罰》を与える方法が‥‥）
English: (But I think there is a way to give Dahlia Hawthorne the ultimate punishment.)

Japanese: ‥‥教えてあげよう。 美柳　ちなみさん‥‥
English: ...Shall I tell you, Ms. Hawthorne?

Japanese: 真宵ちゃんが‥‥ 今、どこにいるのか！
English: Shall I tell you where Maya is this very instant!? Maya Fey is...

Japanese: 事件の夜から、《奥の院》は 世界から切りはなされていた！
English: The Inner Temple was cut off from the outside world on the night of the crime.

Japanese: つまり‥‥真宵ちゃんは、 まだ《奥の院》にいるはずですッ！
English: So in other words, Maya is still there!

Japanese: 弁護人。みなさんを代表して、 私がうかがいましょう。
English: Mr. Wright, let me ask the question that I'm sure is on everyone's minds.

Japanese: 奥の院は、警官隊が すみずみまで捜索したのですよ？
English: The police scoured the Inner Temple from top to bottom, correct?

Japanese: “捜査ッス捜査ッス！”‥‥と、 気合じゅうぶんだったぜ。
English: You bet. Detective Gumshoe had his nose to the ground and sniffed around everywhere.

Japanese: 《奥の院》に綾里　真宵が いなかったことは‥‥
English: Then the fact that Maya is not in the Inner Temple...

Japanese: もう、何度も証明されて いるではないですかッ！
English: ...has already been adequately proven, has it not!?

Japanese: （し、しまった‥‥！ カンがはずれたか‥‥）
English: Y-Yikes...! Guess my intuition was wrong.

Japanese: “カン”だと‥‥？
English: Intuition...?

Japanese: ‥‥よく考えれば わかることだぜ、まるほどう！
English: Truthiness has no place here! Use your brain, not your gut, to find the real truth, Trite!

Japanese: 《奥の院》側にいなかったことは 証明されています！
English: It's already been proven that she isn't on the Inner Temple side!

Japanese: それならば‥‥真宵ちゃんは、 葉桜院のどこかにいるはずですッ！
English: So that means... she must be somewhere in Hazakura Temple!

Japanese: 弁護人。みなさんを代表して、 私がうかがいましょう。
English: Mr. Wright, let me ask the question that I'm sure is on everyone's minds.

Japanese: 事件が起こったとき、すでに 橋は燃え上がっていたのですよ？
English: The bridge was already on fire when the murder took place, correct?

Japanese: ちなみに、オレのハートも 燃え上がっているぜ。
English: Just so you know, my heart is also on fire and it aches from your stupidity.

Japanese: 《奥の院》側から脱出することは 不可能だった‥‥
English: So the impossibility of Maya Fey escaping from the Inner Temple side...

Japanese: たった１つ‥‥ 残された、可能性。
English: There's only one possibility left.

Japanese: それは‥‥‥ この、法廷内なのです！
English: Namely... she's right here in this very courtroom!

Japanese: な‥‥なんですって！
English: Wh-What!?

Japanese: あ‥‥綾里　真宵が！
English: M-Maya Fey is here!?

Japanese: こ‥‥この法廷内にいる、 ですッとォォッ！
English: You say she's here in m-my courtroom!?

Japanese: ‥‥美柳　ちなみさん。
English: ...Dahlia Hawthorne.

Japanese: きみは、さっき‥‥ こう言っていた。
English: I seem to recall that you said...

Japanese: 『１つだけ、カンちがいを していた』‥‥と。
English: "I had misunderstood one thing, you see."

Japanese: そ、それがナニよ！
English: So what!?

Japanese: きっと‥‥もう１つ、 きみはカンちがいをしている。
English: But I think there's one more thing you misunderstood.

Japanese: なんですって‥‥
English: What do you mean...?

Japanese: それじゃあ‥‥ 聞かせてくれるかな。
English: Tell me something.

Japanese: たった“今”‥‥‥この瞬間！
English: At this very moment...

Japanese: 《美柳　ちなみ》を霊媒している のは、いったいだれなのか！
English: ...who is channeling Dahlia Hawthorne!?

Japanese: そ、そんなの‥‥ 決まってるじゃない！
English: Wh-Why that... that's obvious!

Japanese: 綾里　春美よ！　何も知らない あの、おめでたいオコサマでしょ！
English: It's Pearl Fey! That pathetic, little, sniveling runt!

Japanese: ‥‥そうじゃない。
English: ...You're wrong.

Japanese: 春美ちゃんには‥‥ できなかったんだから。
English: Pearls tried... but she couldn't do it.

Japanese: こんなことは、初めてです。 霊を呼べない、なんて‥‥
English: I've never failed at channeling someone. This is the first time it's happened.

Japanese: 何か、考えられないの？ 霊が呼べない理由は。
English: Isn't there any explanation for why you couldn't channel a spirit?

Japanese: わたくしより先に、だれかが その霊を呼んでいる場合です。
English: It could happen if someone else was already channeling the same spirit.

Japanese: 春美より先に‥‥ だれかが、アタシを‥‥？
English: Someone called me before Pearl did...? But who...?

Japanese: 春美ちゃんは、事件の翌日も きみの霊媒をこころみた。
English: Pearls even tried again on the day after the crime.

Japanese: でも‥‥できなかった。 それが、何をイミするか‥‥？
English: But she couldn't do it... What could that mean?

Japanese: そろそろ、きみにも わかるんじゃないかな？
English: I think the truth is becoming clearer to you right about now, am I correct?

Japanese: ああああああああッ！
English: Aaaah!

Japanese: 春美ちゃんには、きみが 呼べなかった！
English: It wasn't Pearls that channeled you!

Japanese: それより先に、この人物が きみを霊媒していたからだッ！
English: There was someone who called you before she could!

Japanese: （ち‥‥ちがう！）
English: (No, that's not who!)

Japanese: （ここまできて‥‥ “わからない”なんて！）
English: (How can I come this far and still not get it!?)

Japanese: （春美ちゃんが、霊媒できず‥‥ 真宵ちゃんが、姿を消した‥‥）
English: (Pearls couldn't channel her. And Maya had disappeared...)

Japanese: （コタエは‥‥ １つしか、あり得ない！）
English: (There's only one possible answer!)

Japanese: 弁護人！　ヒトリゴトは ヒトリのときに言うように！
English: Mr. Wright! You can mumble to yourself like a wino on your own time!

Japanese: も‥‥もう一度、 おねがいします‥‥。
English: P-Please... Give me just one more chance...

Japanese: ‥‥これ以上、カンタンな 話はありません。
English: ...This is an easy one.

Japanese: 春美ちゃんではなかった。 綾里　舞子さんは、もういない。
English: Pearls couldn't do it, and Misty Fey is gone.

Japanese: 残るのは‥‥たったひとり！
English: There's only one possibility left!

Japanese: そ、それは‥‥‥ いったい、ダレなのですかッ！
English: Come on already...! I can't stand the tension!

Japanese: 美柳　ちなみさん！
English: Dahlia Hawthorne!

Japanese: 今、きみを霊媒しているのは‥‥ 綾里　真宵しか、あり得ない！
English: The person channeling you right now must be... Maya Fey!

Japanese: な‥‥‥‥ なんですってェェェェェェェッ！
English: Wh... WHAAAAAAAT!?

Japanese: そ‥‥そんな バカな話がありますかッ！
English: B-But how could that be!?

Japanese: この証人の‥‥美柳　ちなみの 目的を、考えてごらんなさい！
English: Remember what this witness, Dahlia Hawthorne, said about her goal!

Japanese: “目的”なら、モチロン‥‥ 《綾里　真宵の殺害》だろうぜ。
English: She said that her goal was to kill Maya Fey.

Japanese: そのとおりです！
English: Yes, that's right.

Japanese: それなのに、自分の命を狙っている 殺人者を霊媒してしまったら‥‥！
English: But if Maya channeled the spirit of someone that was trying to kill her...!

Japanese: クッ‥‥！ どうなるかな？　ジイさん。
English: Ha...! Well, gramps? What would happen?

Japanese: ま‥‥まさか‥‥
English: C-Could it be...?

Japanese: どうやら‥‥ おわかりになったようですね。
English: It looks like you finally understand, Your Honor.

Japanese: な‥‥ナニよ！ どーいうことなのッ！
English: W-Well, I don't! What are you going on about!?

Japanese: 真宵ちゃんが、なぜ‥‥ きみを霊媒したか‥‥？
English: What I'm going on about is the reason Maya channeled you...

Japanese: ‥‥コタエは １つしかないだろう？
English: And there's only one reason.

Japanese: きみから‥‥《美柳　ちなみ》から 身を守るためだよ。
English: To protect herself from you!

Japanese: あ‥‥アタシから‥‥ 身を‥‥守る‥‥？
English: To... protect herself... ...from me?

Japanese: 事件当夜‥‥。 きみの目的は、ただ１つだった。
English: Yes. On the night of the crime, you were only interested in one thing.

Japanese: 『綾里　真宵を探し出して ‥‥殺害する！』
English: Killing Maya Fey!

Japanese: 《奥の院》側は閉ざされて、 どこにも逃げ場はない。
English: The path to the Inner Temple was closed off and there was nowhere for her to run.

Japanese: ‥‥そこで、問題になるのは‥‥
English: So then the problem became...

Japanese: 《どこにかくれるのが 最も、安全か》‥‥？
English: "Where would be the safest place to hide?"

Japanese: あ‥‥‥ああああああああああッ！
English: Ah... Aaaaaaaaaah!

Japanese: そ、それが‥‥あ。アタシ‥‥？
English: Y-You mean... That's when she channeled me...?

Japanese: きみは、春美ちゃんに霊媒されて いると思いこんでいた。
English: All along you thought you had been channeled by Pearls...

Japanese: ‥‥だから、 気づくことができなかった。
English: That's why it never occurred to you...

Japanese: 綾里　真宵のかくれ場所は‥‥
English: ...that Maya's hiding place...

Japanese: 他のどこでもない、 “きみ自身”だったんだ！
English: ...was you!
N-No... No...

Japanese: バカなコトがァッ！
English: DON'T SAY THAT!

Japanese: こ‥‥このアタシが‥‥ 美柳　ちなみが‥‥
English: Y-You're saying that I...

Japanese: 手玉にとられたと言うの！ あんな、ガキに！
English: ...was played for a fool!? By that little whelp!?

Japanese: 綾里　真宵は自殺したのよ！ そうとしか考えられないわ！
English: Maya Fey killed herself! Isn't it obvious!?

Japanese: ザンネンだけど‥‥吾童川に 身を投げることはできなかった。
English: Sorry, but no... It would have been impossible for her to jump into the Eagle River.

Japanese: ‥‥そう。これが、 最後に残された方法だったんだよ。
English: ...This was the only avenue of escape open to Maya.

Japanese: 世界から孤立した《奥の院》で、 真宵ちゃんが“消える”方法‥‥！
English: The only way that Maya could disappear from the Inner Temple...!

Japanese: あ、アタシは‥‥信じないわ！
English: I-I don't believe you...!

Japanese: ‥‥あんなアタマの悪そうな、 世間知らずの女の子が‥‥
English: A stupid little girl like that who has never been out in the real world...

Japanese: そんなこと、思いつくワケがない！
English: She could never have come up with a plan like that!

Japanese: いったい、ダレが‥‥ そんな知恵を、あの子に与えたの！
English: Who could have ever given her such a brilliant idea!?

Japanese: それは‥‥‥
English: Well...

Japanese: ‥もちろん、私よ‥
English: ...Me, of course...

Japanese: ち‥‥‥千尋さん！ M...
English: Mia!

Japanese: ‥‥綾里　チヒロォォ‥‥ッ！
English: Mia Fey!

Japanese: ‥‥ひさしぶりね。 美柳　ちなみさん‥‥
English: It's been a long time, Dahlia Hawthorne...

Japanese: ‥‥やっぱり‥‥ アンタだったのかい。
English: ...So it's true... It was you.
...Yes.

Japanese: クッ‥‥！ ヤッカイな女、だぜ‥‥
English: Ha...! You're something else...

Japanese: あ‥‥アンタが‥‥ いったい、なぜ‥‥！
English: B-But what... what are you doing here...!?

Japanese: そのアタマ‥‥ 春美ちゃん、ですね？
English: That hair... It's Pearls, right?

Japanese: ‥‥いいかしら、ちなみさん。
English: Tell me something, Dahlia...

Japanese: もう一度‥‥あの夜のことを 思い出してごらんなさい。
English: I want you to think back to that night one more time.

Japanese: あなたは‥‥《奥の院》の中庭で、 真宵を追いつめた。
English: You had just cornered Maya in the Inner Temple's garden.

Japanese: そして‥‥最後の瞬間に、 意識を失ったそうね。
English: And then... in the final moments of the fight, you lost consciousness.

Japanese: アタシは、刺されたのよ！ 綾里　真宵に‥‥！
English: I was stabbed! By Maya Fey!

Japanese: じつは、そのとき‥‥ 真宵のほうも気を失ったらしいの。
English: Actually... Maya lost consciousness at the same time as you.

Japanese: ‥‥綾里　真宵が‥‥？
English: ...She did?

Japanese: 殺されそうになったのだから、 ムリもないのでは‥‥
English: Not terribly surprising since she was about to be killed.

Japanese: ‥‥意識を取り戻したとき、 あの子は修験堂にいたそうよ。
English: ...When she woke up, she was in the Training Hall.

Japanese: そして、真宵は‥‥ すぐに、この私を霊媒したの。
English: That's when Maya decided she needed help... So she channeled me.

Japanese: 自分のおかれた立場を、 メモに書き記して‥‥
English: She explained in a memo the situation she was in.

Japanese: これからどうするべきか？ ‥‥私に相談してくれたわ。
English: She asked me what I thought she should do.

Japanese: あの、コムスメが‥‥ アンタに、相談を‥‥？
English: She did that...? I can't believe it...

Japanese: 私にも、詳しい状況は わからなかった。
English: Of course, I didn't have all the details.

Japanese: でも‥‥１つだけ、 ハッキリしていることがあったわ。
English: But... One thing was perfectly clear.

Japanese: そ、それは‥‥？
English: And that was...?

Japanese: 《美柳　ちなみ》を自由にしては いけない、ということ。
English: I knew that you couldn't be allowed to wander free.

Japanese: “自由”‥‥って、 どういうことですか？
English: Free...? What do you mean?

Japanese: ‥‥一刻を争う状況だったわ。 私は、真宵に２つのことを命じた。
English: It was a race against time, so I wrote down two things that Maya had to do.

Japanese: 『すぐに《美柳　ちなみ》を 霊媒すること』
English: Channel Dahlia Hawthorne as soon as possible...

Japanese: 『そして、助けが来るまで、 自分を閉じこめておくこと』
English: ...and lock herself in the Sacred Cavern until help arrived.

Japanese: （あの《錠》をかけたのは 真宵ちゃんだったのか‥‥）
English: (So it was Maya who put that lock on there...)

Japanese: それにしても‥‥ どうして、そんな命令を？
English: Yes, but why did you order her to do those two things?

Japanese: もし、ぐずぐずしていたら‥‥
English: If she hadn't done it...

Japanese: 美柳　ちなみは、他の人物に 霊媒されていたでしょうからね。
English: ...Dahlia Hawthorne would've been channeled by someone else.

Japanese: ‥‥そう。綾里　春美に！
English: By one Pearl Fey.

Japanese: は‥‥‥春美ちゃん、ですか？
English: P-Pearls?

Japanese: あの子は、今回の計画を 正しく理解していなかった。
English: Yes. Pearl didn't properly understand the plan.

Japanese: だから‥‥綾里　キミ子の指示を 守ることだけを考えていたの。
English: So all she was trying to do was follow her mother, Morgan Fey's instructions.

Japanese: もし、あの子が《美柳　ちなみ》の 霊媒に成功してしまったら‥‥
English: If she had succeeded in channeling Dahlia Hawthorne's spirit...

Japanese: おそらく‥‥サイアクの事態が 起こったでしょうね。
English: ...things would have turned out very badly, to put it mildly.

Japanese: ‥‥そういうコト、か。
English: ...So that's how it was.

Japanese: 《美柳　ちなみ》は、 綾里　春美の身体を使って‥‥
English: Dahlia Hawthorne would have used the body of Pearl Fey...

Japanese: 綾里　真宵を、殺害しただろうな。 ‥‥どんな手を使っても。
English: ...to kill Maya at all costs.

Japanese: た、たしかに‥‥ 恐らく、そうなっていたでしょう！
English: Y-Yes, it certainly sounds like that was the intent all along.

Japanese: ば‥‥バカ‥‥な！ この‥‥この、アタシが‥‥
English: H-How dare you!? I-I won't forget this...!

Japanese: いいかげん、認めたらどうですか？ ‥‥美柳　ちなみさん。
English: Why not just admit it? ...Dahlia Hawthorne.

Japanese: きみたちの計画は‥‥ ミゴトにシッパイしたんです！
English: Your little plan was nothing but a big failure.

Japanese: そのとおり。 ‥‥またしても‥‥、ね。
English: Yes... Another failure to add to the pile of shame, wouldn't you say?

Japanese: な‥‥何よ、それ。 “またしても”‥‥？
English: Wh-What do you mean by another!?

Japanese: ‥‥美柳　ちなみさん。 思い出してみたらどうかな。
English: Think about it, Dahlia. Remember all your past crimes?

Japanese: きみの犯行は‥‥ただの一度も、 成功したためしがないんだよ。
English: Not a single one of them was a success. They all ended in failure.

Japanese: な‥‥‥なんですって‥‥‥
English: What...!? How dare you...!

Japanese: 今から、１０年ほど前‥‥
English: 11 years ago...

Japanese: あの狂言誘拐事件が‥‥ きみの最初の犯行だ。
English: The fake kidnapping... Your very first crime.

Japanese: ２億円のダイヤは手に入れた。 ‥‥でも‥‥
English: You got your hands on a 2 million dollar diamond. But...

Japanese: 尾並田さんが脱走して、美柳　勇希 に会いに行ったことから‥‥
English: ...after Terry Fawles escaped and went to meet with Valerie Hawthorne...

Japanese: すべては、バレてしまった。
English: ...the truth was exposed.

Japanese: う‥‥うるさいッ！ あれは、アタシのせいじゃないわ！
English: Sh-Shut your mouth! That wasn't my fault!

Japanese: ‥‥あの、バカな死刑囚と、 気の小さい婦人警官のせいよ！
English: It was because of that stupid oaf of a prisoner and that weakling of a policewoman!

Japanese: そして‥‥その、１年後。
English: And then... one year later.

Japanese: きみは、今度は‥‥ このぼくを殺そうとした。
English: You tried to kill me.

Japanese: まあ‥‥。あいにく ぼくは今も、生きているけど‥‥。
English: Well... I'm still alive, but...

Japanese: きみは、ちがう人物を 殺害してしまったあげく‥‥
English: ...you wound up killing someone else.

Japanese: ついに、死刑を宣告されたわけだ。
English: As a result, you were sentenced to death.

Japanese: ‥‥つくづく、マヌケな話だね。 もう、笑う気にもなれない。
English: ...It's one stupid move after another for you. But it's no longer funny.

Japanese: だ‥‥ダマれ！　この‥‥この お人好しの、ガキが‥‥！
English: You...! Wipe that smug, happy-go-lucky smile off your face...!

Japanese: そして、今回！
English: And now this!

Japanese: きみは、またしくじったのさ！ 綾里　真宵を取り逃がした。
English: You've messed up again! You let Maya Fey escape.

Japanese: きみのエモノは、 ずっと目の前にいたのにね！
English: Even though she was right there in front of you!
...Grr...Mmm...Nnnn... Grrr... Ahh!

Japanese: あ‥‥アヤサト　チヒロ‥‥ アヤサト　チヒロォォォォ‥‥ッ！
English: M... M... Mia F... F... Fey Mia Fey! Mia Fey! MIA FEEEEY!

Japanese: き、キサマが‥‥ キサマさえ、いなければ！
English: You... You... spinster!!

Japanese: アタシは、綾里　真宵を 殺していた！
English: I was supposed to kill Maya Fey like I swore I would!

Japanese: シャクにさわる、このオトコも 有罪判決を受けていたし‥‥
English: And if only you had gotten this spiky-haired jerk the guilty verdict...

Japanese: アタシも、死刑になることは なかったのよ！
English: ...I wouldn't have been hanged to death!

Japanese: そうよ。
English: True.

Japanese: ‥‥美柳　ちなみさん。 やっと、わかったかしら。
English: But I think you finally understand, Dahlia Hawthorne.

Japanese: ‥‥あなたは、 私には勝てないの。
English: ...You will never defeat me.

Japanese: な‥‥なんですって‥‥
English: Wh-What...!? What did you say!?

Japanese: 一生かかっても‥‥いいえ。 死んでも、勝てやしない。
English: Whether you're alive, dead, or somewhere in between, you will never defeat me.

Japanese: この私の前で‥‥ 永久に、恥をかきつづけるのよ！
English: As long as I'm around, you're destined to lose for all of eternity!

Japanese: う‥‥ううううう‥‥うううう‥‥
English: Grrr... Grrrr... Grrrrr...

Japanese: ‥‥審理の最初に、 きみは、こう言っていた。
English: ...I remember what you said earlier in the trial.

Japanese: ‥‥ぼくたちは、きみを 罰することはできない。
English: You said there was no way we could punish you...

Japanese: なぜなら‥‥ きみは、《死者》だから。
English: ...because you were already dead.

Japanese: そ、それが、なによ！
English: What about it!?

Japanese: そして‥‥こうも言った。
English: Then you said...

Japanese: 『肉体は消えても、その魂は‥‥ プライドは、永遠に残る』と。
English: "Even when the body dies, the spirit, the ego, it lives on... forever."

Japanese: ‥‥そうなの、ちなみさん。
English: ...That's very true, Dahlia.

Japanese: それこそが‥‥あなたに対する、 逃れられない《罰》なのよ。
English: And that's exactly the punishment you'll never be able to escape from.

Japanese: あなたは、永久に 《美柳　ちなみ》なの。
English: For all of eternity, you'll have to remain as Dahlia Hawthorne.

Japanese: だれにも‥‥私にすら勝てない、 無力で、ヒキョウな存在‥‥
English: A miserable, pathetic, weak creature who can never win at anything...

Japanese: そして‥‥そこから逃れる道は、 もう存在しないわ。
English: And for you, there is no escape from that. No hope of freedom.

Japanese: ‥‥あなたの死刑が執行された、 その日に‥‥
English: Since the day you were executed...

Japanese: あなたの細い橋は、 燃え落ちてしまったのよ！
English: ...the narrow bridge that once stretched out in front of you has burnt to a crisp!

Japanese: ‥‥ウ‥‥ウウウウウ‥‥
English: ...Y-You... OoOooOOh...

Japanese: ‥‥チ‥‥チガウ‥‥
English: ...Y-You'RE... wROnG...

Japanese: ‥‥ソンナ‥‥ハズガナイ‥‥
‥‥コ、コノ‥‥アタシガ‥‥ ‥‥キサマラナンカニィィィ‥‥
English: ...How... coULd... I... ...loSe... to... THe... ...likES... of... YOU...?

Japanese: ‥‥でも。
English: It no longer matters!

Japanese: ‥‥そんなことはね。 もう、どうでもいいんだ。
English: I don't care whether you win or lose anymore.

Japanese: それよりも‥‥‥
English: The only thing I want...

Japanese: ‥‥さっさと、真宵ちゃんから 出ていってもらおうかッ！
English: ...is for you to come out of Maya's body right now!

Japanese: ウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウ オオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオ
English: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

Japanese: オオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオ オオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオ
English: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA IIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIII

Japanese: オオオオオオオオオオオオオオオオ ヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲ
English: IIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIII IIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIII

Japanese: ヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲ ヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲヲ
English: EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE
...I'M... NOT... READY... ...NOT... READY... TO... GO...

Japanese: ‥‥なるほどくん‥‥ ‥‥おねえちゃん‥‥
それでは‥‥
English: Now then...

Japanese: あなたこそが‥‥ホンモノの あやめさん、なのですね。
English: I assume you are the real Iris...?

Japanese: ‥‥はい。先ほど、修験洞から 助けていただきました。
English: ...Yes. I was just rescued from the Sacred Cavern.

Japanese: さすが、双子というだけあって、 よく似ていらっしゃる。
English: I must say you and your twin sister are indeed identical from what I can see.

Japanese: ‥‥どうやら‥‥
English: In any case...

Japanese: すべてがアキラカに なったようです。
English: It appears that everything has finally been cleared up.

Japanese: ゴドー検事。‥‥美柳　ちなみは？
English: Mr. Godot. ...What happened to Dahlia Hawthorne?

Japanese: オレに聞かれても困るが‥‥
English: If you ask me, Your Honor...

Japanese: 帰っちまったんじゃねえか。 ‥‥アイツの世界に。
English: ...it looks like she went back to the hell she came from.

Japanese: ‥‥ふむう‥‥
English: Hmm...

Japanese: 今回の事件の被害者は、 綾里　舞子さんだけではなかった。
English: It seems that Misty Fey wasn't the only victim of this crime.

Japanese: 綾里　真宵さんも、 おさない綾里　春美さんも‥‥
English: Maya Fey, as well as the young Pearl Fey...

Japanese: きわめて利己的な犯罪計画の 被害者だったわけですね。
English: ...were also victims of this wicked and selfish plan.

Japanese: ‥‥そのとおりです。
English: Yes, Your Honor.

Japanese: 《霊媒の谷》という特殊な世界が 生み出したヒゲキ‥‥でした。
English: The tragedy of "Medium Valley" has finally come to an end, it seems.

Japanese: あの霊は、もう呼ばないほうが いいでしょうな。
English: It would be best for everyone if no further attempt was made to channel that spirit again.

Japanese: あの‥‥裁判長。
English: Umm... Your Honor?

Japanese: なんですか？
English: Yes, what is it?

Japanese: 《霊媒》のことですけど‥‥
English: About this whole "spirit medium" thing...

Japanese: ブキミなほど、すんなり 受け入れていますね。
English: It's almost weird how comfortable you seem to be with the concept now.

Japanese: じつは、弟も裁判官でしてね。 よく、こう言うのですよ。
English: Well, to be frank, my younger brother is quite judgmental...

Japanese: 私は、あまりに勉強不足だ、と。
English: He often criticizes me for not studying hard enough.

Japanese: それで‥‥‥倉院流霊媒道の資料を 研究しておいたわけです。
English: That's why I made a concerted effort to study up on the Kurain Channeling Technique.

Japanese: （《お！カルト》新年号 真冬の霊場・大特集じゃないか）
English: (Hey! Isn't that the New Year's issue of "Oh! Cult!"!?)

Japanese: ‥‥私も、この席について、 さまざまな事件を見てきました。
English: ...I've seen quite a few things in my many years on the bench.

Japanese: そして‥‥ やっと、わかったのです。
English: And in all that time, I've finally learned this one thing.

Japanese: 事件は、さまざまな世界を 背景に起こります。
English: Each case is different, and takes place in its own world, if you will.

Japanese: その本質を理解するためには‥‥
English: In order to fully understand that world...

Japanese: 私たちはまず、その世界を 受け入れなければならない。
English: ...first we have to immerse ourselves in it completely.

Japanese: そこが‥‥‥弟と私の ちがう点、なのでしょうね。
English: And that's where... My brother and I used to differ.

Japanese: （なるほど、ね‥‥）
English: (Hmm, never thought of it that way...)

Japanese: ‥‥それでは！　葉桜院　あやめに 判決を言いわたしましょう。
English: ...At any rate! It's time to pass judgment in the case of Iris of Hazakura Temple.

Japanese: ‥‥早すぎる木槌‥‥ カッコつかねえぜ。
English: ...You're a little too fast with that gavel, Your Honor.

Japanese: ど‥‥どういうことですか！ ゴドー検事！
English: What do you mean by that, Mr. Godot!?

Japanese: 審理は‥‥まだ、終わっていない。 ‥‥そういうこと、ね。
English: This trial... It isn't over yet. ...That's what he means.

Japanese: な‥‥なんですって！
English: W-What!?

Japanese: まるほどう‥‥
English: Trite...

Japanese: あの、タチのワルい悪霊の証言。 ‥‥よく、思い出してみるんだ。
English: Remember what Miss Evil Spirit said in her testimony?

Japanese: 美柳　ちなみの‥‥証言‥‥？
English: Huh? Dahlia's testimony?

Japanese: 大きな灯ろうの前で‥‥ アタシは、あの子を追いつめた。
English: I caught up with her in front of the stone lantern.

Japanese: そして‥‥物置で拾った 小刀で、切りかかったの。
English: Then I took out the dagger I got from the storeroom and...

Japanese: ‥‥フシギなことに‥‥
English: It's strange, but...

Japanese: そこからの記憶は ハッキリしないの。
English: I don't have a clear memory of what happened after that.

Japanese: アタシ‥‥ 刺されたような気がするわ。
English: I think... I think I was stabbed.

Japanese: ‥‥美柳　ちなみは、綾里　真宵に 襲いかかろうとした瞬間‥‥
English: ...Just as Dahlia Hawthorne was about to attack Maya...

Japanese: 何者かに刺されて‥‥ 《殺害》されたのです。
English: ...she was stabbed and "killed" by someone.

Japanese: た‥‥ たしかに、そうですが‥‥
English: Y-Yes... That's right...

Japanese: ジッサイに命を落としたのは、 ちなみの霊を呼んだ、霊媒師‥‥
English: The person that was ultimately killed was the spirit medium that channeled Dahlia...

Japanese: 天流斎　エリス‥‥いや、 綾里　舞子だった。
English: ...Elise Deauxnim, no, Misty Fey.

Japanese: しかし‥‥。 だれが彼女を殺害したのか‥‥？
English: But... who killed her?

Japanese: その犯人は、まだ わかっていねえのさ！
English: We still don't know who did it!

Japanese: な‥‥なんだってェェェェッ！
English: Th-This isn't over!?

Japanese: 他に容疑者が現れない以上、 被告人の疑いも消えねえ。
English: Unless someone else is found guilty, the accused is still on trial.

Japanese: 彼女の無実を決定的に立証する 証拠は‥‥まだ、何もねえのさ。
English: We can't let her walk until there is evidence that proves her innocence.

Japanese: そ‥‥そんな‥‥
English: N-No way...

Japanese: しかし‥‥本法廷で、 これ以上の審理の用意は‥‥
English: But... This court isn't prepared for any further testimony...

Japanese: ‥‥検察側は、 ここで最後の証人を召喚するぜ。
English: The prosecution is ready to call our final witness!

Japanese: さ、最後の‥‥証人‥‥！
English: F-Final... witness!?

Japanese: そいつで‥‥ ハッキリさせようじゃねえか。
English: This one will clear up the whole mystery...

Japanese: “だれが、綾里　舞子を 殺害したのか”‥‥？
English: The mystery of "Who killed Misty Fey"!

Japanese: ‥‥ふ、ふむう‥‥！
English: ...Hmm, indeed!

Japanese: 本当に、いいのね？ ‥‥検事さん。
English: Is it really alright... Mr. Prosecutor?

Japanese: モチロン、かまわねえさ。 ‥‥弁護士さん。
English: Of course it's alright... Madame Attorney.

Japanese: それで‥‥‥
English: Very well then...

Japanese: 最後の証人とは‥‥ いったい、どなたですかな？
English: Who is this final witness?

Japanese: クッ‥‥！ 決まってるじゃねえか。
English: Ha...! Isn't it obvious?

Japanese: いるだろう？　決定的な‥‥いや。 いっそ、致命的な目撃者が。
English: There's one person who saw the whole event and will put the final dagger in this case.
S-Someone who saw the murder take place...?

Japanese: ‥‥目の前で、自分の母親を 殺害されちまった、張本人さ。
English: ...The very person who saw her mother killed in front of her own eyes.

Japanese: ま‥‥‥ 真宵ちゃんだって！
English: Y-You mean... Maya!?

Japanese: ‥‥ムリだ！　あんな目に あったばかりなのに‥‥
English: ...You can't! She can't testify after what she's just been through!

Japanese: ‥‥《真実》を知るためだ。
English: We need to find the truth.

Japanese: 検察側は、綾里　真宵を 証人として召喚するぜ！
English: The prosecution calls Maya Fey to the witness stand!

Japanese: ‥‥いいでしょう。
English: ...Very well.

Japanese: それでは、ここで休憩を とりたいと思います。
English: But first, we'll take a brief recess.

Japanese: ‥‥医務室に運ばれた 証人の回復を待ちましょう。
English: ...We'll have to wait for Ms. Fey to recover before summoning her.

Japanese: 医師の許可が下りしだい、 審理を再開します！
English: Once we receive the doctor's permission, we will proceed with the trial!

Japanese: ‥‥いいか、まるほどう。 これだけは、言っておくぜ。
English: ...Hey, Trite. I've got something to say to you, so listen up.

Japanese: ‥‥なんですか。
English: ...What is it?

Japanese: オレは決して、アンタを 認めたわけじゃねえ。
English: I don't think much of you as a lawyer.

Japanese: アンタは、いつもそうだ。
English: It's always the same with you.

Japanese: ‥‥事件のウラを理解せず、 その場しのぎの弁護をして‥‥
English: ...You somehow manage to just squeak by without even a faint understanding of the case.

Japanese: カンジンなところで、キレイな お姉さんが現れて、助けてくれる。
English: Some beautiful woman always seems to come dashing in at the last minute to save you.

Japanese: な‥‥、なんだって！
English: Y-You've got some nerve!

Japanese: ‥‥そんなヤツに、 一人前ヅラはさせねえ。
English: ...But that's not going to happen this time.

Japanese: 今度こそ‥‥！ キサマの力でかかってきな。
English: This time... you're going to have to do this by yourself.

Japanese: それでは、これより 審理を一時、中断します！
English: That's enough! This court is now in recess!

Japanese: 同日　午後　２時５６分 地方裁判所　被告人第１控え室
English: February 10, 2:56 PM District Court Defendant Lobby No. 1

Japanese: 本当に、申しわけありません。
English: I'm truly sorry about everything.

Japanese: 成歩堂さんが一生懸命がんばって くださったのに、私ときたら。
English: You were working so hard to defend me...

Japanese: きのう一日、 お話しすることもできなくて‥‥
English: But I was missing all day, and we didn't even have a chance to talk...

Japanese: （‥‥そういえば‥‥）
English: (...She's right.)

Japanese: （きのう、修験堂で《あやめさん》 に会ったときは‥‥）
English: (When I met "Iris" at the Training Hall yesterday...)

Japanese: （すでに、入れ替わったあと‥‥ あやめさんは修験洞の中だった）
English: (...they had already switched places... and Iris was inside the Sacred Cavern.)

Japanese: ‥‥今日も、せめて被告席で 応援させていただきたかったのに。
English: ...I wanted to at least be in the defendant's box today to root you on.

Japanese: し、しかたありませんよ。 閉じこめられていたんですから。
English: W-Well, it wasn't your fault. You were locked up this whole time...

Japanese: それより、あやめさん‥‥
English: There's something more important than that, though. I have to ask you...

Japanese: どうして、そこまで お姉さんに協力するんですか？
English: Why did you help your sister out as much as you did?
Huh...?

Japanese: きのうだって、修験洞で 助けを求めてくれれば‥‥
English: If you had tried to get help at the Sacred Cavern yesterday...

Japanese: まる１日も、閉じこめられずに 済んだのに。
English: ...you wouldn't have spent an entire day locked up in there.

Japanese: お姉さまは‥‥ かわいそうな方なのです。
English: My sister... I felt sorry for her.

Japanese: おかあさまに見捨てられて‥‥ お父さまにも、愛されなかった。
English: She was abandoned by our mother and never got any love from our father either.

Japanese: でも‥‥。それは あなたも同じ、ですよね‥‥？
English: Yes, but... it was the same for you too, wasn't it?

Japanese: ‥‥私には、毘忌尼さまが いらっしゃいましたから。
English: Yes, but at least I had Sister Bikini, who was like a mother to me.

Japanese: ‥‥お姉さまも、いっしょに 葉桜院に来ればよかったのに。
English: If only Dahlia had come with me to Hazakura Temple...

Japanese: 私‥‥お姉さまが大好きでした。
English: I always... I always loved her...

Japanese: 頭がよくて、行動力もあって、 決して弱音を吐かない‥‥
English: Dahlia was always so smart, so strong... She never complained about a thing.

Japanese: だから、私‥‥
English: That's why I...

Japanese: お姉さまのお手伝いをする、って ヤクソクしたんです。
English: That's why I promised her that I would help her.

Japanese: それは‥‥１０年ほど前の 誘拐事件のコトですか。
English: Are you talking about the fake kidnapping case 11 years ago?

Japanese: ‥‥ええ。私、 お姉さまの役に立ちたかった。
English: ...Yes. I-I wanted to be useful to her in some way...

Japanese: でも、やっぱり‥‥
English: B-But, as usual...

Japanese: 私、弱くてヒキョウだったから‥‥ 最後に、逃げてしまったんです。
English: I was too cowardly... At the last minute, I ran away.

Japanese: ‥‥そのせいで‥‥
English: Because of that...

Japanese: お姉さまは‥‥ 義理の姉・勇希さまを‥‥
English: Dahlia's half-sister, Valerie, ended up...

Japanese: （‥‥千尋さんが、ひどく キズついた、あの事件だな‥‥）
English: (That was the case that wounded Mia so badly...)

Japanese: でも‥‥事件を終わらせることは できませんでした。
English: But... things didn't end there, of course.

Japanese: ついに、お姉さまを 疑う方たちが現れたのです。
English: Some people suspected that my sister was involved in the murder.

Japanese: 美柳　ちなみさんを“疑った”。 もちろん、それは‥‥
English: Some people...? You must mean...

Japanese: おふたりの弁護士です。
English: Yes, two defense lawyers.

Japanese: 綾里　千尋さまと‥‥ 神乃木　荘龍さま。
English: Mia Fey... and Diego Armando.

Japanese: お姉さまは、自分に近づいてきた 神乃木さまに毒を飲ませたうえ‥‥
English: After poisoning Mr. Armando, who was getting too close to learning the truth...

Japanese: その毒をかくしてくださった方まで 殺そうとなさったのです。
English: ...Dahlia even tried to kill the person who had unknowingly hid the poison for her.

Japanese: ‥‥そう。あなたです。
English: You.
(...That's right...)

Japanese: ‥‥あやめさん。
English: ...Iris.

Japanese: もう１つ、聞いておかなければ ならないことがあります。
English: There's one more thing that I have to ask you.

Japanese: はい。なんでしょうか‥‥
English: Yes, what is it?

Japanese: 事件当夜のことです。
English: On the night of the murder...

Japanese: 被害者の‥‥天流斎　エリスさんの 死体を《始末》したのは‥‥
English: ...the person that cleaned up the corpse of the victim, Elise Deauxnim...

Japanese: やっぱり、 あなただったんですか？
English: Was it... Was it really you?

Japanese: ええ。‥‥私です。
English: Yes... It was me.

Japanese: ‥‥あの晩、《消灯の鐘》を 鳴らしたあと‥‥
English: That night, after I rang the lights out bell...

Japanese: 私、自室に戻りました。
English: I went back to my room.

Japanese: １０時半ごろ‥‥ 私の携帯電話が鳴ったんです。
English: At around 10:30, I received a call on my cell phone.

Japanese: 《メンドウなことになった‥‥ すぐ、奥の院に来てほしい》
English: "There's a problem... Come to the Inner Temple right away."

Japanese: 私‥‥スノーモービルで 《奥の院》に向かいました。
English: I... I got on the snowmobile and headed for the Inner Temple.

Japanese: でも‥‥！
English: But...!

Japanese: ‥‥《奥の院》への道は、 断たれてしまった‥‥
English: The path to the Inner Temple was cut off... Right?

Japanese: そのとおりです。
English: Exactly.

Japanese: 《‥‥死体を、こっちに 残しておくのは、マズい‥‥》
English: "We can't just leave the body here..."

Japanese: 《‥‥言うとおりにしてくれ‥‥》
English: "...Alright, let's do this as you said..."

Japanese: 私は‥‥あの方の身体を 受け取りました。
English: It was me... I was the one that received her body.

Japanese: 死体には、出血をおさえるために 《凶器》が刺さったままでした。
English: The murder weapon had been left in her body so she wouldn't bleed too much.

Japanese: エリスさまの持っていらした、 あの、ツエが‥‥。
English: The staff that Mystic Elise always held...

Japanese: やっぱり‥‥
English: I knew it...

Japanese: 本当の《凶器》は‥‥ このツエだったんですね。
English: So the actual murder weapon was the staff.

Japanese: ‥‥ええ。そうです。
English: ...Yes, that's right.

Japanese: 私‥‥スノーモービルで 葉桜院に死体を運びました。
English: I brought the body back to Hazakura Temple on the snowmobile.

Japanese: ‥‥しかし‥‥ なぜ、あんな工作を‥‥？
English: But why... Why did you alter the body?

Japanese: ‥‥凶器を、あのツエだと 知られたくなかったのです。
English: ...I didn't want anyone to know that the staff was the murder weapon.

Japanese: 綾里　舞子さまの痕跡を いっさい、残したくなかった‥‥
English: I didn't want to leave anything that would lead back to Misty Fey...

Japanese: ローブをお着せして、傷をごまかす ために、七支刀を刺して‥‥
English: So I dressed her in a robe and stabbed her with the Shichishito...

Japanese: ツエのカタナの血をぬぐって、 そばに置いておきました。
English: I wiped the blood off the staff's blade and left it next to her on the ground.

Japanese: ‥‥あやめさん。 最後に、教えていただけますか？
English: ...Iris. Just tell me one last thing.

Japanese: あなたを電話で呼び出した、 《真犯人》の名前を。
English: Tell me the name of the person that called your cell phone. The real killer.

Japanese: すみません、成歩堂さん‥‥。
English: I'm sorry, Mr. Wright...

Japanese: 私の口からは‥‥どうしても、 申し上げられないのです。
English: I can't do it... I can't say who did it.

Japanese: そう、ですか‥‥。
English: I... I see...

Japanese: 証拠品《被害者のツエ》の データを書きなおした。
English: Victim's Staff updated in the Court Record.

Japanese: ‥‥被告人！
English: ...Defendant!

Japanese: 裁判長がお呼びです！ 執務室のほうへ行きなさい。
English: The Judge is calling you! He wants you to see you in his chambers.

Japanese: 美柳　ちなみのことを 聞きたいそうです。
English: He has some questions about Dahlia Hawthorne.

Japanese: ‥‥わかりました。
English: ...Alright.

Japanese: それでは‥‥ また、のちほど‥‥。
English: Well then... I'll see you later...

Japanese: 聞いていただきたいことが ありますから。
English: There's something I want to tell you later.

Japanese: え。‥‥は、はい‥‥ （“聞いてほしいこと”‥‥？）
English: Oh, um... OK... ("Something she wants to tell me"?)

Japanese: （やっぱり‥‥）
English: (So it's true...)

Japanese: （あやめさんは、《犯人》に 協力していたんだ‥‥）
English: (Iris cooperated with the real killer...)

Japanese: （おそらく‥‥最初から！）
English: (Maybe even from the very beginning!)

Japanese: ‥‥なるほどくん。
English: ...Phoenix.

Japanese: 千尋さん‥‥！
English: Mia...!

Japanese: あ、あの！　真宵ちゃんの ぐあいは、どうなんですか！
English: Umm... H-How is Maya doing!?

Japanese: 身体のほうは、シンパイないわ。 体力なら、じきに回復するから。
English: Physically, I'm not worried. She'll recover completely.

Japanese: でも‥‥ココロのほうは、 ヒドく痛めつけられているわ。
English: But emotionally, she's been hurt very badly by this case.

Japanese: ‥‥そ、そうですか‥‥。
English: I-I see...

Japanese: ‥‥！　もしかして‥‥ エリス先生の正体を‥‥？
English: ...! You don't mean...! She's learned who Elise Deauxnim really was?

Japanese: ‥‥ええ。真宵には 医務室で、すべてを話したわ。
English: ...Yes. I went to the medical office and talked with her.

Japanese: 私が知っていることは、 残らずゼンブ‥‥ね。
English: I told her everything I knew.
...But why?

Japanese: ‥‥真宵は、とても強い子よ。
English: Maya is stronger than you think...

Japanese: きっと、受けとめられるわ‥‥ すべてを、ね。
English: I knew she could take it... All of it.

Japanese: “すべてを”って‥‥ どういうことですか？
English: What do you mean by that?

Japanese: そのコタエは‥‥‥ あなた自身で見つけなさい。
English: I want you to figure that answer out by yourself.

Japanese: ‥‥そろそろ、 最後の法廷が始まるわ。
English: ...The trial is about to restart.

Japanese: 真犯人の名前は‥‥ もう、わかっているかしら？
English: The real killer... Do you know who it is yet?

Japanese: （‥‥あやめさんは、 教えてくれなかった。でも‥‥）
English: (Iris wouldn't tell me who called her. But still...)

Japanese: （なんとなく‥‥ リンカクは、見える気がする）
English: (I think that just maybe... I know who it was.)

Japanese: あの晩‥‥被害者は《奥の院》の 中庭で殺害されました。
English: That night, the victim was killed in the garden of the Inner Temple.

Japanese: 犯人が“偶然”そんなところに いたとは、考えにくい。
English: And the criminal wasn't just there by accident.

Japanese: ‥‥と、いうことは‥‥
English: Which means...

Japanese: 犯人は、最初から《計画》を 知っていたことになります。
English: ...that the killer knew of Dahlia's plan from the very beginning.

Japanese: ‥‥そして、もう１つ。
English: ...And one more thing.

Japanese: 被害者は、《振り子》を使って 葉桜院側にわたされたわ。
English: The victim was moved to the Hazakura Temple side by pendulum.

Japanese: つまり‥‥犯人自身は 橋をわたることはできなかった。
English: In other words... the criminal couldn't cross the bridge.

Japanese: まる１日、《奥の院》側に 閉じこめられていたことになるわ。
English: That means they were stuck on the Inner Temple side for almost an entire day.

Japanese: （‥‥そのとおり。 だから、犯人は‥‥）
English: (Exactly. So the criminal...)

Japanese: （事件の翌日、葉桜院側に いなかった人物‥‥！）
English: (...was someone that wasn't in Hazakura Temple the following day...!)

Japanese: 私が協力できるのは、ここまでね。
English: That's as much help as I can give you.

Japanese: ここからは、 あなたひとりの力で戦うの。
English: The rest of the battle is yours to win... or lose.

Japanese: ええ、わかっています。 ‥‥ありがとう、千尋さん。
English: OK, I've got it. ...Thank you, Mia.

Japanese: （ついに‥‥この事件にも 決着がつくときが来た‥‥）
English: (Finally... It's almost time to bring this case to an end.)

Japanese: （真宵ちゃんは、いったい 何を目撃したのか‥‥？）
English: (What exactly did Maya see anyway...?)

Japanese: （そして‥‥綾里　舞子を 殺害した犯人は、だれなのか？）
English: (And who was it that actually killed Misty Fey?)

Japanese: （‥‥何もかも、 アキラカにするんだ‥‥）
English: (Whoever it was, I have to prove it...)

Japanese: （この、ぼく自身の手で！）
English: (Me. All by myself.)

Japanese: つづく
English: To be continued.

Japanese: そこまで！
English: That's enough!

Japanese: 本法廷は、これ以上の審議の 必要性を認めません。
English: This court sees no reason to further prolong this trial.

Japanese: さらに、被告に対する判決を 決める時間も、必要としません。
English: Nor is there any need for more time to decide the case against the defendant.

Japanese: これは、きわめて明白な事件です。 疑問の余地はない！
English: This case is extremely clear. I see no room for mis- interpretation of the facts.

Japanese: 被告人、葉桜院　あやめに たった今、判決を言いわたします！
English: This court finds the defendant, Iris of Hazakura Temple...

Japanese: 被告人はこれより身柄を 司直に預けるものとし、
English: The accused will surrender to the court immediately...

Japanese: １ヶ月以内に、高等裁判所において 通常裁判を受けることとします。
English: ...to be held pending trial at a higher court within a month from today's date.

Japanese: では、本日はこれにて閉廷！
English: That is all. The court is adjourned!
